channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Goalkeeper Alyssa Naeher wins 2024 US Soccer Female Player of the Year
item.description: Goalkeeper Alyssa Naeher, who stepped down from the U.S. national team late last year after winning a gold medal at the Paris Olympics, was named the 2024 U.S. Soccer Female Player of the Year.
item.dc:creator: Anne M. Peterson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: California pals Tien, 19, and Michelsen, 20, are 2 of 4 US men in the Australian Open's 4th round
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Learner Tien and Alex Michelsen were born about 15 months apart and first crossed paths a decade ago when they were playing in Southern California tennis tournaments for kids.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sofia Goggia earns her 4th downhill win in Cortina while Lindsey Vonn is 20th on the Olympic course
item.description: Sofia Goggia solidified her status as the favorite for another downhill gold by winning for the fourth time in Cortina on the course for next year’s Olympics.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dampf, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Mavericks beat Thunder 106-98 as OKC All-Star Shai Gilgeous-Alexander sits with wrist injury
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Kyrie Irving scored 25 points, Spencer Dinwiddie and P.J. Washington Jr. added 16 apiece and the Dallas Mavericks beat Oklahoma City 106-98 Friday night as Thunder All-Star Shai Gilgeous-Alexander missed his first game of the season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sammy Sosa gets warm reception for his reconciliation with the Chicago Cubs
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Sammy Sosa jogged onto the stage, carrying an American flag. The crowd cheered wildly. It was just like old times — only Sosa was dressed in a suit, and the scene occurred in a downtown hotel ballroom instead of Wrigley Field.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mojo fan gifts head coach handmade jacket
item.description: “Aside from an Olympic medal, and we had to earn that one, this is probably one of the best gifts I've ever received,” San Diego Mojo head coach Tayyiba Haneef-Park said.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: NFL selects Dolphins for inaugural game in Spain as league's international series continues to expand
item.description: The first-ever game in Spain is part of the NFL International Series, which will also include three games in London and one in Germany during the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WNBA players reveal 'super scary' privacy and security fears after Caitlin Clark stalker incident
item.description: Ahead of the opening week of the upstart 3-on-3 league, Unrivaled, many WNBA players who are participating spoke up about the issue of stalking.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to watch Stanford vs. UNC basketball in the Bay Area
item.description: (KRON) -- The Stanford Cardinal men's basketball team will face North Carolina in a cross-country ACC battle on Saturday. The game is being shown exclusively on KRON4. Stanford (11-6, 3-3 ACC) and UNC (12-6, 5-1 ACC) tip off at 11:15 a.m. PT. You can watch on KRON4 on stream on the CW app.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Beck hopes to bring big play ability to Utes offense
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - When Kyle Whittingham called former BYU quarterback Jason Beck about becoming the Utes new offensive coordinator, Beck jumped at the chance. "When I hit that time of year and had some opportunities come up, and and Coach Witt came calling," Beck said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Montréal Canadiens hockey player struck by car while in Salt Lake City
item.description: The team later confirmed Emil Heineman suffered an "upper-body" injury and is expected to be sidelined for three to four weeks.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, NewsNation

item.title: Montréal Canadiens hockey player struck by car while in Salt Lake City
item.description: Montréal Canadiens hockey player Emil Heineman will be sidelined for several weeks after he was struck by a car in Salt Lake City.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Connor Ingram returns for Utah Hockey Club
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club began a seven-game homestand last week by winning just one of three games. But they still have four games left at the Delta Center beginning Tuesday night against Montreal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Texas man accused of sending Caitlin Clark violent messages on X: court docs
item.description: A Texas man is accused of sending sexually violent messages from his X account to Indiana Fever star Caitlin Clark and then driving to Indianapolis, court documents reveal.
item.dc:creator: Matt Christy, Fox 5

item.title: Mike McCarthy not returning as coach of the Dallas Cowboys, AP source says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Mike McCarthy is not returning as head coach of the Dallas Cowboys, who are going on three decades since their last Super Bowl title, a person with knowledge of the decision told The Associated Press on Monday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jayden Daniels leads Commanders to first playoff win in nearly 7,000 days, 23-20 over the Buccaneers
item.description:
New owners. New general manager. New coach. New franchise quarterback.
That’s the formula — with an emphasis on the QB — that Washington rode to playoff success after nearly two decades of futility.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lamar Jackson and Josh Allen will face off for a berth in the AFC championship game
item.description: Lamar Jackson vs. Josh Allen won’t decide the NFL MVP next week. The stakes are higher with a spot in the AFC championship game on the line.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Clippers, Lakers to resume their wildfire-delayed schedules on Monday
item.description: NBA games are scheduled to return to wildfire-ravaged Los Angeles on Monday night, with the Clippers planning to resume their schedule when they host the Miami Heat and the Lakers set to host Victor Wembanyama and the San Antonio Spurs.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jackson and Henry lead the way as the Ravens run over the rival Steelers 28-14 in the AFC playoffs
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Lamar Jackson handed off to Derrick Henry, then slid out to the left as if he still had the ball. A couple linebackers shifted into Jackson's path, leaving the middle open for Henry to run through for a 44-yard touchdown.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Red Rocks finish fourth in high-powered quad meet
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The #4 Utah gymnastics team got a sense of where it stacks up early in the season against some of the top teams in the country.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nationals and Jorge López agree to $3 million, 1-year deal
item.description: The Washington Nationals and former All-Star pitcher Jorge López agreed to terms on a 1-year contract, the team announced Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
